name: Head Voice Vwohm
pedagogy: Develops easy head-voice access by sliding down through two descending intervals: 6 to 4, then 4 to 1. The voiced 'vw' onset semi-occludes the airflow for a gentle, pressure-free start, and the open 'ohm' release lets the slide settle into resonance. Landing each slide from above keeps the larynx released, while the keys climb a half step per iteration so head voice is led step by step up into the challenging range. The quarter rest between slides resets the breath so each slide is a distinct, unhurried gesture.
